segments.text: In that day this song will be sung in the land of Judah:
We have a strong city; God will appoint salvation for walls and bulwarks.
segments.speaker: Judah

segments.text: Open the gates, That the righteous nation which keeps the truth may enter in.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You will keep him in perfect peace, Whose mind is stayed on You, Because he trusts in You.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Trust in the Lord forever, For in YAH, the Lord, is everlasting strength.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For He brings down those who dwell on high, The lofty city; He lays it low, He lays it low to the ground, He brings it down to the dust.
The foot shall tread it down— The feet of the poor And the steps of the needy.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The way of the just is uprightness;
O Most Upright, You weigh the path of the just.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Yes, in the way of Your judgments, O Lord, we have waited for You; The desire of our soul is for Your name And for the remembrance of You.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: With my soul I have desired You in the night, Yes, by my spirit within me I will seek You early; For when Your judgments are in the earth, The inhabitants of the world will learn righteousness.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Let grace be shown to the wicked, Yet he will not learn righteousness; In the land of uprightness he will deal unjustly, And will not behold the majesty of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Lord, when Your hand is lifted up, they will not see. But they will see and be ashamed For their envy of people; Yes, the fire of Your enemies shall devour them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Lord, You will establish peace for us, For You have also done all our works in us.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: O Lord our God, masters besides You Have had dominion over us; But by You only we make mention of Your name.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are dead, they will not live; They are deceased, they will not rise. Therefore You have punished and destroyed them, And made all their memory to perish.
You have increased the nation, O Lord, You have increased the nation; You are glorified; You have expanded all the borders of the land.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Lord, in trouble they have visited You, They poured out a prayer when Your chastening was upon them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: As a woman with child Is in pain and cries out in her pangs, When she draws near the time of her delivery, So have we been in Your sight, O Lord.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: We have been with child, we have been in pain; We have, as it were, brought forth wind; We have not accomplished any deliverance in the earth, Nor have the inhabitants of the world fallen.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Your dead shall live; Together with my dead body they shall arise. Awake and sing, you who dwell in dust; For your dew is like the dew of herbs, And the earth shall cast out the dead.
segments.speaker: God

verses.title: Take Refuge from the Coming Judgment

segments.text: Come, my people, enter your chambers, And shut your doors behind you; Hide yourself, as it were, for a little moment, Until the indignation is past.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For behold, the Lord comes out of His place To punish the inhabitants of the earth for their iniquity; The earth will also disclose her blood, And will no more cover her slain.
